speech:
👋 Welcome to the AI Career Guidance Assistant!

I can help you with:
• 🎯 Career roadmaps
• 🛠️ Skill recommendations
• 💼 Job roles & salaries
• 📈 Growth opportunities
• ⚠️ AI impact analysis

Tell me: What career are you interested in? (e.g., AI/ML, Web Dev, Data Science, Cybersecurity, Cloud, DevOps, UI/UX, Finance Tech, Mobile Dev, Blockchain)
